free_text: Fragmentation of nuclei of various nucleon composition
in the interaction with 1 GeV protons.
A magnetic with a dE/E-telescope as a
detector of the particles, dE-detector using a
thin-window ionization chamber while a Si(Au)-detector
was used to measure the energy of the particles.
The cross sections were normalized to the known cross
section for alpha-particles from silver at the 60 degr.
The dependence of the fragments yields on the parameter
SD: MONITOR was added. Info from COMMENT
was moved to MONITOR. REL-REF -> MONIT-REF, journal
title corrected (JET -> JEP). In Subents 002-033: free
text corrected, SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION codes.
SF5=IND deleted from MONITOR code (Subent 001) and
No information about source of uncertainties
